---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What are you trying to accomplish? What is the current pain point? A few sentences is plenty — link to a real workflow or PR if you can.

## Proposed solution

How would you like the action to behave? Be specific: new input, new output, new section in the generated comment, new workflow example, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution better? (e.g. a custom workflow, a fork, a different existing action)

## Out of scope (optional)

Are there parts of your idea that should be deferred to a follow-up, or that we should explicitly **not** do? Calling those out helps reviewers.

## Willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this myself.
- [ ] Yes, but I'd like guidance first.
- [ ] No, just an idea — please discuss.
